query:
SELECT id, target_universities, target_majors, updatedAt 
FROM student_profiles 
WHERE user_id = 1 
LIMIT 1;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT id, target_universities, target_majors, updatedAt 
FROM student_profiles 
WHERE user_id = 1 
LIMIT 1;
